<article>President Donald Trump said that he hopes Israel and Iran can broker a deal but said sometimes countries have to ‘fight it out’ first.

items.title: LIVE: View of skylines in Israel | REUTERS
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>A view of the skylines in Haifa, Tel Aviv, Jerusalem's Old City and Bethlehem in Israeli-occupied West Bank.
 
Israel and Iran kept up their attacks, killing and wounding civilians and raising concern among world leaders in the G7 meeting in Canada this week that the biggest battle between the two old enemies could lead to a broader regional conflict.
 
#strike #attack #skyline #TelAviv #Jerusalem #Bethlehem #WestBank #Israel #Iran #live #Reuters #news

Keep up with the latest news from around the world: https://www.reuters.com/</article>

items.title: US army members operate battle tank during military parade
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>A timelapse video shows members of the U.S. army waving atop a battle tank during the military parade in Washington, D.C. on June 14, 2025. 

Thousands of spectators lined up along the route. President Trump watched the proceedings from an elevated viewing stand behind bulletproof glass.

The U.S. Army brought nearly 7,000 troops into Washington, along with 150 vehicles, including more than 25 M1 Abrams tanks, 28 Stryker armored vehicles, four Paladin self-propelled artillery vehicles, and artillery pieces including the M777 and M119.

🔗 Find everything you need to know about the parade at our link in bio.

#militaryparade  #unitedstates  #trump  #donaldtrump  #usarmy  #washington

items.title: Barcelona residents protest tourism with water pistols | REUTERS
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>Thousands gathered in Barcelona's city center to protest the growing impact of mass tourism on local communities. Activists say tourism is driving up housing costs, damaging the environment, and displacing residents.

items.title: Ancient boats return to the waters of Iraq's Basra
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>Traditional boats that once navigated Mesopotamian rivers are returning to Basra's waterways through a local heritage initiative. The Maritime Revival Project, established in 2017, aims to resurrect Iraq's naval traditions by recreating models used in ancient Iraqi civilizations, including Sumerian and Babylonian, based on historical manuscripts and texts.
 
#iraq #basra #boat #mesopotamia #tradition #heritage</article>

items.title: German zoo welcomes baby elephant
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>Baby Kaja is exploring her enclosure and having fun with her parents. While the mother initially had some trouble feeding her baby, her 55-year-old aunt and animal keepers helped to solve the problem. Under the watchful eye of zookeepers, vets, the family of elephants seems to be thriving.
 
#zoo #elephant #conservation #wildlife #germany</article>

items.title: LIVE: Nationwide ‘No Kings Day’ protests counter Trump parade | REUTERS
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>WARNING: MAY CONTAIN STRONG LANGUAGE OR GRAPHIC IMAGES

Anti-Trump activists plan nationwide protests, as a military parade and festival in Washington D.C. marks the 250th anniversary of the US Army. The day is also US President Donald Trump's 79th birthday.

items.title: Washington parade celebrates US Army's 250th anniversary | REUTERS
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>President Donald Trump's long-sought military parade rolled through the streets of downtown Washington, D.C., celebrating the U.S. Army's 250th anniversary. Trump's parade, which falls on his 79th birthday, started earlier than expected as thunderstorms were forecast in the Washington area.

#parade #USArmy #Trump #armyparade #Washington #DonaldTrump #News #Reuters #Newsfeed
